scenario.name: UAS Presence Server

recv.action: <ereg regexp="Contact: *<([^>]+)>" search_in="msg" check_it="true" assign_to="1,contact"/> <ereg regexp="From: *<([^>]+)>" search_in="msg" check_it="true" assign_to="2,from_uri"/>

scenario.send:
NOTIFY [$contact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:bob@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <[$from_uri]>;tag=[$from_tag] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 NOTIFY Max-Forwards: 70 Event: presence Subscription-State: active;expires=3600 Content-Type: application/pidf+xml Content-Length: [len]
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <presence xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf" entity="sip:bob@[local_ip]"> <tuple id="tuple1"> <status> <basic>open</basic> </status> <note>Available</note> </tuple> </presence>
